# Covid Dashboard mobile version => portrait

the portrait mode requires a new UI design concept.

open for ideas!

![Screenshot 2020-04-24 at 20 48 12](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/1177434/80246582-ef716f00-866c-11ea-8a9a-70604ee18f39.png)

the header should probably be an own tab.

tabs only using icons to reduce the size.

historical data either above or below the table.
